title: Cross-Module Dependency Map
methodology: Mechanical scan of all committed backend files listed as owned in F0-003_module_ownership_inventory.json (routes/services/middleware/jobs/utils) for (a) relative imports resolving into another domain's file set, and (b) prisma.<model>.<method>()/tx.<model>.<method>() calls where <model> is owned by a different domain (per the F0-003 §3 Prisma model ownership table). Comments are stripped before scanning. Supplemented with targeted manual review (Grep/Read) of the 6 F0-003 hotspot files, all 16 raw-SQL locations, and the highest fan-out/fan-in domain pairs. Frontend coverage is targeted (not exhaustive across all 64 pages): src/services/api.ts (shared client), src/pages/PatientDetail.tsx, dashboard pages, messaging inbox pages.

coverage.methodology: Mechanical scan of all committed backend files listed as owned in F0-003_module_ownership_inventory.json (routes/services/middleware/jobs/utils) for (a) relative imports resolving into another domain's file set, and (b) prisma.<model>.<method>()/tx.<model>.<method>() calls where <model> is owned by a different domain (per the F0-003 §3 Prisma model ownership table). Comments are stripped before scanning. Supplemented with targeted manual review (Grep/Read) of the 6 F0-003 hotspot files, all 16 raw-SQL locations, and the highest fan-out/fan-in domain pairs. Frontend coverage is targeted (not exhaustive across all 64 pages): src/services/api.ts (shared client), src/pages/PatientDetail.tsx, dashboard pages, messaging inbox pages.
knownLimitations: Mechanical scan covers only relative (in-repo) imports and direct prisma/tx model-method calls; it does not resolve dynamic imports, does not follow re-exports through barrel files, and cannot detect cross-domain calls that go through an intermediate same-domain wrapper function before reaching another domain (rare in this codebase per spot checks).
